See the * [FAQ in the README](README.md#problems-with-invalid-numbers] on how to make * metadata changes. * * Do not modify this file directly! */ return [ 6793 => 'Suva City/Nausori/Korovou', 67965 => 'Coral Coast/Sigatoka', 67966 => 'Lautoka/Ba/Vatukoula/Tavua/Rakiraki', 67967 => 'Nadi', 67985 => 'Vanua Levu', 67988 => 'Vanua Levu', ];
